Create powerful mobile advertising with custom truck magnets magnetic signs designed for maximum brand visibility. ## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS - **Size Options**: Custom truck magnets magnetic available in sizes up to 24" x 24" - **Finish Type**: Rounded corners, square cut, or contour cut options - **Production Speed**: 1-day priority to 5-day saver options - **Design Upload**: Upload your artwork or use our design services ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Professional truck magnets magnetic signs offer the perfect solution for businesses seeking versatile, cost-effective mobile advertising. Our high-quality magnetic truck signs feature 30-mil magnetic material with laminated protection, ensuring your brand message remains vibrant and readable through all weather conditions. Unlike permanent vehicle graphics, these removable magnetic signs protect your truck's original paint while providing maximum advertising flexibility.

Each custom truck magnet delivers professional-grade durability with full-color printing capabilities. The magnetic base adheres securely to any steel truck surface, creating instant brand recognition wherever you drive. Our custom car magnets use the same premium materials, making them perfect for expanding your fleet advertising across different vehicle types.

Whether you're promoting services, contact information, or company branding, these truck magnets magnetic signs provide professional results without permanent commitment. The easy-to-remove design allows for seasonal updates, promotional changes, or vehicle transfers, making them ideal for growing businesses and temporary campaigns.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Our truck magnets magnetic construction utilizes premium 30-mil magnetic sheeting with weather-resistant lamination for superior durability and longevity. This professional-grade magnetic material ensures strong adhesion to steel truck surfaces while maintaining easy removal without residue or paint damage.

The laminated surface protection shields your custom design from UV rays, moisture, and road debris, preserving color vibrancy and text clarity for extended outdoor use. Our full-color printing process delivers sharp graphics and precise text reproduction on the magnetic substrate, ensuring professional appearance and maximum brand impact.

Before ordering, verify your truck's surface compatibility, as magnets require steel panels for proper adhesion. Aluminum and plastic body panels won't hold magnetic signs securely. Our custom dry erase magnets use similar magnetic technology for indoor applications, demonstrating our expertise in magnetic material applications across diverse uses.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Standard truck magnets magnetic finishing includes rounded corners, our recommended option for optimal performance and longevity. Rounded corners improve airflow dynamics around your magnetic sign, reducing wind lift and maintaining secure adhesion during highway driving conditions.

Square cut finishing provides traditional clean lines for formal business presentations, while contour cutting allows custom shapes that follow your logo or design elements precisely. Each finishing option maintains the same magnetic strength and weather resistance, ensuring reliable performance regardless of your chosen style.

All finishing options include protective lamination as standard, providing UV resistance and scratch protection for your investment. The smooth laminated surface also makes cleaning simple, allowing you to maintain professional appearance throughout the life of your truck magnets magnetic signs.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Flexible truck magnets magnetic production schedules accommodate urgent deadlines and planned campaigns. Choose from 1-business-day priority service for immediate needs, 2-day express for quick turnarounds, 3-day standard for most projects, or 5-day saver for cost-conscious orders.

Production timing begins after artwork approval and file upload completion. Orders requiring design modifications or proof approvals start production timing after final approval confirmation. Rush services and same-day production may be available for emergency situations.

All production times represent business days only, excluding weekends and holidays. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin processing the following business day to ensure quality control and proper preparation.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Secure payment processing for truck magnets magnetic orders accepts all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover. Payment authorization occurs only after order approval, ensuring complete satisfaction with specifications before billing.

Check payments provide alternative payment options for larger orders or established business accounts. Checks must clear before production begins, so factor additional processing time into your project timeline when choosing this payment method.

All orders require full payment before production starts, ensuring immediate processing once payment clears. Our secure payment system protects your financial information while streamlining the ordering process for faster delivery of your custom magnetic signs.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Standard UPS Ground shipping delivers truck magnets magnetic orders within 1-3 business days to 90% of United States locations. Expedited shipping options include overnight, 2-day, and 3-day services for time-sensitive projects requiring immediate delivery.

Package tracking numbers provide real-time delivery updates from our Minnesota production facility. Shipping costs calculate based on package weight and destination distance, with additional charges applying to oversized orders exceeding standard dimensional limits.

International shipping requires customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation through USPS or UPS services. Economy shipping options add 5-10 additional days but offer cost savings for non-urgent deliveries to residential and business addresses.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Professional truck magnets magnetic signs excel in service industry applications including plumbing, electrical, HVAC, landscaping, and delivery services. The removable design allows personal vehicle use while maintaining professional appearance during business hours, maximizing advertising exposure without permanent vehicle modifications.

Construction companies benefit from temporary project identification, while real estate professionals use magnetic signs for property promotion and open house advertising. Food service businesses leverage truck magnets for catering delivery identification and mobile marketing opportunities throughout their service areas.

Small businesses appreciate the cost-effective advertising potential of magnetic truck signs, converting every trip into marketing opportunities. Similar magnetic advertising solutions like custom fridge magnets extend brand recognition into customers' homes, creating comprehensive marketing campaigns across multiple touchpoints.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Professional truck magnets magnetic printing requires high-resolution artwork files, preferably vector-based formats like .eps with outlined fonts. PDF and high-resolution JPG files also produce excellent results when properly prepared with sufficient resolution and color space specifications.

Our graphic design team provides artwork assistance and file optimization services to ensure your magnetic signs meet professional printing standards. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, guaranteeing accurate color reproduction for brand-specific requirements.

Order proofs allow design review before production begins, including low-resolution artwork preview and complete order verification. Proof approval is required before production starts, so factor review time into your project timeline for optimal results and satisfaction.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Transform your truck into a powerful marketing tool with professional-grade magnetic signs that deliver exceptional visibility and brand recognition. Our premium truck magnets magnetic construction ensures reliable performance through all weather conditions while protecting your vehicle's original finish. The versatile design allows easy repositioning, seasonal updates, and vehicle transfers, maximizing your advertising investment across multiple applications.

Professional installation takes seconds, requiring no tools or special skills, while removal leaves no residue or surface damage. This flexibility makes magnetic truck signs ideal for businesses requiring temporary advertising, seasonal promotions, or fleet vehicle identification. Our custom photo magnets demonstrate the same quality construction principles in smaller formats, showcasing our commitment to magnetic product excellence across all applications and ensuring consistent brand representation.

## 14) FAQ **How long do truck magnets magnetic signs last on vehicles?** Professional-grade truck magnets can last 3-5 years with proper care and maintenance. The 30-mil magnetic material and protective lamination resist fading, cracking, and weather damage. Regular cleaning and occasional removal for vehicle washing extends lifespan significantly. **Will magnetic truck signs damage my vehicle's paint finish?** Quality magnetic signs protect paint by creating a barrier against road debris and UV exposure. Proper installation on clean surfaces and periodic removal for cleaning prevents any potential paint issues while maintaining your vehicle's resale value. **What truck surfaces work best with magnetic signs?** Steel truck panels provide optimal magnetic adhesion for secure attachment. Aluminum, plastic, and fiberglass surfaces won't hold magnets reliably. Most truck doors, tailgates, and side panels feature magnetic-receptive steel construction perfect for magnetic sign installation. **Can I customize truck magnets with my specific business colors?** Full-color printing capabilities reproduce your exact brand colors, logos, and graphics with precision. Our Color Match Proof System ensures accurate color reproduction for brand-critical applications, maintaining consistent marketing appearance across all materials. **How do I properly install and maintain magnetic truck signs?** Clean the truck surface thoroughly before application, ensuring no dirt or debris interferes with magnetic contact. Remove signs weekly for cleaning both the magnet and vehicle surface, preventing buildup that could affect adhesion or appearance. **What sizes are available for custom truck magnets?** Custom sizing up to 24" x 24" accommodates various truck applications and design requirements. Popular sizes include door panels, tailgate advertising, and side panel identification. Larger coverage areas can use multiple coordinated magnetic signs for maximum impact.
